metadata.description: Cross-validation of GT against 450+ golden rules (Source 1 + Source 2 + CA answers)
metadata.methodology: 3-pass: rapidfuzz (threshold 80) -> agent CA reasoning -> cross-company consistency

disputes.golden_rule_name: Profit on sale of fixed assets / Investments

disputes.agent_reasoning: Rent generally maps to row 68. GT has 49 (Others Mfg) - could be factory rent. | DISPUTE: Golden rule says row 68 but GT has row 49.
Rent generally maps to row 68. GT has 71 (Others Admin). | DISPUTE: Golden rule says row 68 but GT has row 71.

disputes.agent_reasoning: Vehicle HP Loans non-current maps to row 148 (Other Debts). GT has 141 (Debentures). | DISPUTE: Golden rule says row 148 but GT has row 141.
Changes in WIP/stock-in-trade is a NET change, not raw materials. Should be split into Opening/Closing rows (53/54). GT maps to 42 which seems incorrect.
'Salary, Wages and Bonus' for manufacturing maps to row 45 per CA rules (Salary/Wages/Bonus combined) | DISPUTE: Golden rule says row 45 but GT has row 67.

disputes.raw_text: Contribution to Provident Fund and ESI
disputes.agent_reasoning: EPF/ESI contribution for manufacturing maps to row 45 per CA rules | DISPUTE: Golden rule says row 45 but GT has row 67.
Trading rule: Staff Welfare->67 [DISPUTE golden=67 vs GT=45]
Trading rule: Electric->71 not 48 [DISPUTE golden=71 vs GT=48]
Rent->68 [DISPUTE golden=68 vs GT=49]
TDS on Rent is rent compliance->68 [DISPUTE golden=68 vs GT=49]
Rent Parking->68 [DISPUTE golden=68 vs GT=49]

disputes.agent_reasoning: Interest on deposits/PPF->30 [DISPUTE golden=30 vs GT=34]
Transport/Freight in direct expenses->47 [DISPUTE golden=47 vs GT=49]
Opening Stock P&L->58 (standard CMA: FG Opening; GT may use 53 SIP for trading cos) [DISPUTE golden=58 vs GT=53]
Closing Stock P&L->59 (standard CMA: FG Closing; GT may use 54 SIP for trading cos) [DISPUTE golden=59 vs GT=54]
CA rule: Commission->70 [DISPUTE golden=70 vs GT=71]
Sundry Balance W/off->90 [DISPUTE golden=90 vs GT=71]
Freight in admin (trading): CA default Freight->47; could be 70 if outward or 71 if admin misc [DISPUTE golden=47 vs GT=71]

disputes.agent_reasoning: Duty drawback/IGST is in Other Income section. Not actual export revenue. Should be 34 not 23.
Rent should be 68 per CA rules. GT says 49 (factory rent). Without factory designation, standard is 68.

disputes.raw_text: Rates and taxes (excluding taxes on income)

disputes.agent_reasoning: Sundries is generic admin expense -> 71. GT says 69 Bad Debts which is wrong for sundries.
Repairs to Plant and Machinery -> row 50 per CA rules. GT says 72 which is admin repairs.
Admin Exp for PF is EPFO admin charge. Per CA rules EPF -> 45. GT says 67.
Tea and Food in manufacturing: staff welfare -> 45 per industry rules. GT says 67.
Expenses Payable should be 249. GT says 250 Other CL.
ST debentures should be 140 (within 1yr). GT says 141 (after 1yr).
General security deposits should be 238 per CA rules. GT says 237 (govt depts only).
Power/Fuel in TRADING -> 71 per industry rules. GT says 49 (manufacturing only).
Employee Benefits in TRADING -> 67 per industry rules. GT says 71.
Advertisement -> 70 per CA rules. GT says 71.
Repairs in trading -> 72 Repairs(Admin). GT says 71.

disputes.raw_text: Loss on disposal of fixed assets (estimated)
disputes.agent_reasoning: Loss on disposal of fixed assets -> 89. GT says 93 Others Non-Op.
HSBC OD should be 132 (second bank). GT says 131 combining both.
